news.summary: Palestinians in the occupied West Bank went on a general strike after Israel passed a death penalty law.

news.headline: US Supreme Court to hear constitutional test of birthright citizenship
news.summary: Advocates warn of fallout for immigrants as challenge to Trump executive order to be heard before top US court.
